changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Add 7 additional tenant users for tenant-discovery demo

changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Seed realistic tenant search profiles for the discovery demo
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'tenant1@howners.test'), 'Boulogne-Billancourt', '92', '92100', 900, 1400, 'APARTMENT', 35, 1, 'NO_PREFERENCE', '2026-06-01', 'Développeur junior en CDI depuis 1 an. Calme, non-fumeur, sans animaux. Garant familial solide.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'tenant2@howners.test'), 'Paris', '75', '75011', 950, 1300, 'STUDIO', 22, 0, 'FURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-07-01', 'Designer graphique freelance, revenus 3500€/mois. Cherche studio meublé Paris 11e/Bastille. Stable depuis 3 ans.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'tenant3@howners.test'), 'Suresnes', '92', '92150', 550, 800, 'STUDIO', 18, 0, 'FURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-09-01', 'Étudiant en M2 Finance à Dauphine. Bourse + emploi étudiant 800€/mois. Garant parental solide.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'lea.moreau@howners.test'), 'Paris', '75', '75016', 700, 1100, 'STUDIO', 20, 0, 'FURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-09-01', 'Étudiante M2 Communication à Sciences Po. Stage en alternance 1200€/mois. Très calme, non-fumeuse.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'thomas.roux@howners.test'), 'Levallois-Perret', '92', '92300', 1300, 1800, 'APARTMENT', 35, 1, 'NO_PREFERENCE', '2026-06-15', 'Consultant CDI depuis 4 ans, 4200€ net. Cherche T2 lumineux proche métro ligne 3.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000006', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'camille.lefevre@howners.test'), 'Neuilly-sur-Seine', '92', '92200', 2000, 2800, 'APARTMENT', 55, 2, 'UNFURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-07-01', 'Couple cadre + médecin, revenus cumulés 8500€/mois. Cherche T3 non-meublé avec balcon ou terrasse.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000007', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'antoine.dubois@howners.test'), 'Versailles', '78', '78000', 2500, 3500, 'HOUSE', 90, 3, 'UNFURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-08-15', 'Famille avec 2 enfants (6 et 9 ans). Cadres dans le public, revenus 7800€/mois. Cherche maison avec jardin proche écoles.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000008', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'ines.bernard@howners.test'), 'Paris', '75', '75007', 1800, 2500, 'APARTMENT', 45, 1, 'FURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-06-01', 'Retour de mission à Singapour. Cadre dirigeante, 6000€/mois. Cherche meublé prêt-à-vivre Paris rive gauche.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000009', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'mathieu.roussel@howners.test'), 'Issy-les-Moulineaux', '92', '92130', 1500, 2200, 'LOFT', 60, 1, 'NO_PREFERENCE', '2026-07-01', 'Fondateur d''une startup SaaS (15 employés). Bilans à jour. Cherche loft atypique, télétravail à domicile.', true, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO tenant_search_profiles (id, tenant_id, desired_city, desired_department, desired_postal_code, budget_min, budget_max, desired_property_type, min_surface, min_bedrooms, furnished_preference, desired_move_in, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'elodie.garnier@howners.test'), 'Vincennes', '94', '94300', 1100, 1500, 'APARTMENT', 40, 1, 'UNFURNISHED_ONLY', '2026-08-01', 'Fonctionnaire Éducation Nationale, CDI titulaire. Mutation récente. Profil très stable, garante de la MGEN.', true, NOW(), NOW());
